landing.meta_title: BitPaw OS | Smart Management Platform for Nail Salons & Restaurants
landing.meta_description: BitPaw OS is the all-in-one management platform built for nail salons, spas, and restaurants: GPS staff timekeeping, Smart POS & Kitchen Display System, 360 CRM, omnichannel sales sync, and 24/7 AI customer service — all on one platform.
landing.nav_ind_agency_desc: AI Content, Lead Gen, CRM Funnel
landing.hero_desc: BitPaw OS helps business owners manage sales, HR, customers, AI care, marketing, inventory, and profit reporting on one single platform.
landing.trusted_by: Deep API Integration with 20+ Top Platforms
landing.hook_desc: Hiring one agency for Web, another for Ads, and buying a separate inventory software... Data is fragmented, staff blame each other, and you are exhausted playing the "babysitter".
landing.hook_old_1: Staff arrive late but bypass timekeeping successfully.
landing.hook_old_2: Inventory materials run short without clear reasons.
landing.hook_old_3: Accountant miscalculates commissions, good workers quit.
landing.hook_old_4: Burning Marketing budget without measuring conversions.
landing.hook_new_1: AI Radar monitors and forces 100% auto job assignment.
landing.hook_new_2: All data (Inventory, Salary, Sales, Debts) synced Real-time to 1 screen.
landing.hook_new_3: Absolute accurate payroll matrix, close in 1 click.
landing.hook_new_4: One tech partner handles from Marketing to Operations.
landing.sol1_desc: Completely end time fraud. Solution to optimize the productivity of field workers and technicians via GPS and AI technology.
landing.sol1_f1_desc: Force employees to check-in by face at the exact customer GPS coordinates. Anti fake location via 3rd party apps.
landing.sol1_f2_desc: Real-time digital map. AI scans the nearest available worker and auto-assigns. Customers sign e-signatures directly on the phone.
landing.sol1_f3_desc: System auto sums shifts, commissions, deducts late fines. Accountant closes payroll with 1 click.
landing.sol1_f4_desc: Redraw the entire movement trail of workers during the day on the map, avoiding fake working reports.
landing.sol1_trust: Commit to save 80% of monthly payroll time
landing.sol1_m1_desc: Task assigned to Tech. Nguyen Van A (500m away).
landing.sol2_desc: Flexible menu setup for Multi-industry (Restaurants, Hotels, Nails...). The operational heart of F&B and advanced treatment management for Spa, Clinic.
landing.sol2_f1_desc: Customers scan QR to order. Info pops directly to the kitchen display. Chefs press a button when done. Eliminates paper taking.
landing.sol2_f2_desc: Manage and auto-deduct customer treatment sessions. Fair "Turn" rotation algorithm for the technician team.
landing.sol2_f3_desc: Selling 1 coffee auto deducts 20g beans. Strictly manage cash flow, service bills, incomes/expenses, and debts.
landing.sol2_f4_desc: Auto points accumulation, VIP tiering. CS team uses Zalo ZNS to send auto appointment reminders.
landing.sol3_desc: Pull all orders from e-commerce platforms to one screen. Completely eliminate the risk of overselling and miscalculated actual profit.
landing.sol3_f1_desc: Connect via official API of Tiktok Shop, Shopee, Lazada. A customer buys on one platform, global stock updates instantly.
landing.sol3_f2_desc: System auto deducts platform fixed fees, freeship fees, Ads fees to show the Net Profit Margin you actually put in your pocket.
landing.sol3_f3_desc: Attach 5 Shopee shops, 3 Tiktok shops into 1 screen. No need to login each account to control.
landing.sol3_f4_desc: System auto matches waybills, instantly detects lost orders by shippers or unreturned returns.
landing.sol3_trust: Auto extract platform fees accurately to the penny
landing.sol4_desc: We do not just sell Code, we design "Money Printing Machines". Media, Marketing and Corporate-standard Brand Building solutions.
landing.sol4_f1_desc: Smart Mascot AI active 24/7 on Landing Page to answer all client questions automatically like a real human.
landing.sol4_f2_desc: Sync auto-replies across Messenger, Zalo, Tiktok Shop, automatically collect phone numbers & route leads to Sales.
landing.sol4_f3_desc: Auto-generate trending viral TikTok video scripts and custom ad copies for multiple target groups.
landing.sol4_f4_desc: Smart algorithms to automatically segment VIPs and flag customers at risk of leaving (Churn Risk).
landing.sol4_f5_desc: Auto-propose schedules to send Zalo/ZNS marketing messages to old clients during store idle-times to optimize utility.
landing.sol4_trust: Commit real Leads - Continuous funnel pumping

Ready to Boost Sales
& Automate Operations?
landing.cta_desc: Experience the leading multi-industry SaaS All-in-one ecosystem with AI Radar and Mascot AI customer service in Vietnam. End losses, optimize employee efficiency from today.
landing.testi_title: How Have They Changed Their Business?
landing.testi_desc: Listen to sharing from pioneers in digital transformation with BitPaw.
landing.testi_1_quote: "Since using BitPaw's shift rotation algorithm, my technicians have stopped arguing over customers. The accountant at the end of the month just clicks 1 button to get an accurate 30-person payroll."
landing.testi_2_quote: "The quantitative inventory deduction feature of the POS software is top-notch. Selling 1 coffee auto-deducts 20g of beans. Last month my shop reduced inventory loss by 15%."
landing.testi_3_quote: "Managing a team of 40 AC installation technicians on the street was a nightmare, until using BitPaw's Radar. Where they go, what they do, real or fake check-ins are in the palm of my hand."
landing.timeline_title:
System Live On App
In Just 24 Hours
landing.timeline_desc: Don't worry about complex software installation. BitPaw's engineering team will handle all the tedious steps for you.
landing.tl_1_desc: BitPaw initializes the Database, issues a Master Admin account, and pre-inputs staff and inventory lists for you.
landing.tl_2_desc: Tech experts go directly to the store/company to train staff to use the App smoothly, answering all questions.
landing.tl_3_desc: System activates all features. BitPaw commits to 24/7 support throughout your usage.

landing.compare_desc: Why is BitPaw the ultimate choice you need?

landing.p2_desc: Sales machine for F&B, Spa, Salon.
landing.faq_desc: Quick answers about BitPaw Software Ecosystem and Marketing Services.
landing.faq_q1: Can BitPaw Smart POS connect to bill printers and barcode scanners?
landing.faq_a1: Absolutely. The BitPaw Smart POS ecosystem is designed with Open API standards. We easily connect with hardware peripherals such as bill printers (Bluetooth/LAN), cash drawers, barcode scanners and especially the Kitchen Display System (KDS).
landing.faq_q2: Do Landing Page design and Marketing services guarantee revenue?
landing.faq_a2: Yes. When businesses use BitPaw's Media Agency services, we don't just design UI/UX, SEO optimized Landing Pages, but also handle Ads Performance. KPIs are clearly agreed based on Conversion Rate (CR) and Cost Per Lead (CPL).
landing.faq_q3: Is HRM data and customer data kept secure?
landing.faq_a3: Bank-level security. BitPaw runs on a MongoDB Atlas database combined with cloud servers. All personnel lists, payroll and customer data are AES-256 encrypted and strictly isolated per business (multi-tenant isolation) at the server layer, ensuring you are the only one controlling the Data — not even BitPaw developers can access it.
landing.footer_desc: Pioneering ALL-IN-ONE SaaS empire with AI Radar, Multi-industry Smart POS, Omnichannel Sales, and AI Marketing Agency in Vietnam.
landing.chat_welcome: Hi Boss! BitPaw provides full-package Software and Marketing Services. Leave your phone number and request, we will assign the right expert to call you back! 🚀

INDUSTRY ECOSYSTEM
One tech core, many specialized operating models.
landing.ih_desc: BitPaw OS deeply integrates POS, HRM, CRM and inventory management tailored to each business type in Vietnam. Choose your industry to explore the digital solution:
landing.ih_nail_desc: Staff turn disputes, wrong commissions & losses.
landing.ih_fnb_desc: Wrong paper orders, slow kitchen & stock mismatch.
landing.ih_spa_desc: Treatment session mix-ups, full beds & bottlenecks.
landing.ih_retail_desc: Stock mismatches, Shopee/TikTok order errors.
landing.ih_hotel_desc: Phantom vacancies, forgotten minibar & service fees.
landing.ih_office_desc: Fake check-ins, painful manual payroll.
landing.ih_technical_desc: Hard to track field techs, fake reports.
landing.ih_karaoke_desc: Forgotten room-time billing, snack/drink losses.
landing.ih_production_desc: Material (BOM) waste, hard to measure shift output.
landing.feat_title:
Core Module Ecosystem
Complete Digital Breakthrough For B2B SaaS.
landing.feat_desc: BitPaw OS is not a patchwork of disconnected tools — it's one unified system running on a single Unified Core, syncing all data instantly.
landing.feat1_desc: Lightning-fast checkout, e-invoices/provisional bills, debt tracking, detailed cash-flow management, compatible with any device (Mobile/PC/Tablet).
landing.feat2_desc: GPS + FaceID time tracking to stop buddy-punching, complex shift scheduling, multi-variable payroll management, and 1-click automatic payroll closing.
landing.feat3_desc: 360° customer profiles, service history & treatment-card tracking, automatic point accrual, digital membership cards, and VIP customer group management.
landing.feat4_desc: Mascot AI automatically advises customers on the landing page, integrates with Messenger/Zalo, closes sales through smart conversation, and collects customer phone numbers 24/7.
landing.feat5_desc: AI tool that creates viral TikTok video scripts, generates cross-platform ad content, auto-optimizes Ads, and tracks the data conversion funnel.
landing.feat6_desc: Connects and instantly syncs stock, orders and customers from major e-commerce platforms (TikTok Shop, Shopee, Lazada) into one central dispatch screen.
landing.feat7_desc: A service-booking portal (Spa/Nails) or VietQR self-ordering at the table (F&B) that drastically cuts customer wait time.
landing.feat8_desc: Transparent cash-flow management, automatic quantity-based ingredient deduction per recipe/treatment formula, preventing waste.
landing.feat9_desc: Sales reports and real net profit after platform fees, shipping costs, and staff commissions — on a real-time, visual admin dashboard.
landing.wf_title:
Unified Core Workflow
One data stream automatically running end-to-end.
landing.wf_desc: See how BitPaw OS combines its technology pieces into a perfect automation machine, with no gaps left for losses.
landing.wf1_desc: Customer data from Ads, Web, Facebook or TikTok automatically flows into the CRM funnel.
landing.wf2_desc: Mascot AI automatically chats, answers questions, and collects customers' phone/Zalo 24/7.
landing.wf3_desc: Customers book online automatically or get billed quickly on Smart POS.
landing.wf4_desc: Customer info, treatment cards, and shopping habits are fully tracked.
landing.wf5_desc: AI automatically sends Zalo/ZNS promo messages to bring customers back on the right cycle.
landing.wf6_desc: Net revenue, commissions, and debts automatically update to your Dashboard.
landing.si_title: In-Depth Digital Solutions For 9 Key Industries
landing.si_desc: No single dull template. Each industry gets a feature set deeply optimized to your exact pain points and real operating workflow.
landing.si_nail_pain: Staff feuding over turns, wrong commission math
landing.si_nail_sol: BitPaw Nails automatically rotates staff turns fairly, closes dual commission (service + cross-sell) in 1 click, and AI sends Zalo reminders for gel top-up appointments.
landing.si_nail_b4: AI Zalo reminders every 3-week nail appointment
landing.si_fnb_sol: BitPaw F&B provides a lag-free table QR ordering portal, the kitchen receives orders via realtime KDS screen, and ingredients are auto-deducted by exact quantity.
landing.si_spa_sol: BitPaw Spa integrates secure QR treatment check-off, realtime bed availability map, digital dermatology record management, and technician commissions.
landing.si_hotel_sol: BitPaw Hotel connects directly to OTA platforms, visually displays room status, and automatically bills mini-bar and laundry fees into the invoice.
landing.si_karaoke_sol: BitPaw Karaoke automatically tracks room/table time down to the minute, manages drink combos, and tightly controls snack/drink inventory.
landing.si_office_pain: Missed tasks, fake check-ins, slow payroll
landing.si_office_sol: BitPaw Office manages internal task handoffs, FaceID/GPS check-in against location spoofing, and fast automatic multi-variable payroll (KPI, OT).
landing.si_retail_sol: BitPaw Retail integrates instant barcode POS scanning, realtime Shopee/TikTok Shop stock sync, and automatically breaks down costs to calculate net profit.
landing.si_retail_b4: Accurate P&L reports after platform fees
landing.si_production_sol: BitPaw Production manages BOM norms, fast mobile output logging for workers, minimum-stock alerts, and reasonable shift allocation.
landing.si_technical_pain: Field techs going off-grid, false reports
landing.si_technical_sol: BitPaw Technical manages fault tickets, GPS Radar dispatch to the nearest field technician, mobile parts stock issuance, and e-signature acceptance.
